title: The Log Is The Agent - Ishaan Sehgal, Omnara
summary: Ishaan Sehgal argues that agent identity and continuity should be centered on durable session logs (the data layer) rather than models, frameworks, or tools. As models commoditize, the differentiator shifts to persistent logs that enable agent portability, durability, and state management across different compute, runtime, and model providers.
writeup: Ishaan Sehgal of Omnara argues that an agent's identity and continuity live in its durable session log, the data layer, rather than in the model, framework, or tools it happens to use. The reasoning: as models commoditize, the durable differentiator becomes persistent, append-only logs that capture session state and event history. The takeaway is that centering on logs enables agent portability, durability, and state management across different compute, runtime, and model providers.
